riskFloorReasons: new capability: new config key added

causalAutopsy.notes: The shipped hubCommands.parseHubCommand anchored regexes could misread discussion as a bind command and SWALLOW the message before the agent saw it (the class the 2026-07-03 keyword-intent audit flagged as offender #3). This converts the DECISION to an LLM-with-context classifier that fails open. Not tied to a specific prior PR; it is a latent defect-class in long-shipped code, fixed proactively under the constitutional standard.
